input.text:
Speaker 1: Hi Sarah, I wanted to follow up on the Johnson case.
Speaker 2: Sure, what's going on?
Speaker 1: We need to file the motion to compel by March 15th. Can you handle that?
Speaker 2: Absolutely. I'll also need to schedule the deposition of the expert witness.
Speaker 1: Right, let's get that done before the end of the month. Also, please send the discovery responses to opposing counsel by next Friday.
Speaker 2: Got it. I'll take care of all of that.

expected_spans.extracted_due_text: before the end of the month

expected_spans.extracted_action: Send discovery responses to opposing counsel
